code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut first_even = true
mut first_odd = true
mut start = 0
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    when None
      is_ws = true
    end
  end

  if is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if first_even
            evens = "#{v}"
            first_even = false
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
          end
        else
          if first_odd
            odds = "#{v}"
            first_odd = false
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
